name: Amsterdam
description: 15 stops through Amsterdam's WWII resistance sites, connecting the fight against fascism to your power to vote from abroad.

name: Berlin
tagline: Where the wall fell and democracy rose
description: From the Brandenburg Gate to the Memorial to the Murdered Jews of Europe — a hunt through the capital of modern German democracy.

name: Madrid
tagline: Where Franco's shadow meets a new democracy
description: Tracing Spain's path from dictatorship to democracy across the streets of Madrid, connecting expat votes to civil rights history.
